label: account.journal

activity_state.name: activity_state
activity_state.help_text:
Status based on activities
Overdue: Due date is already passed
Today: Activity date is today
Planned: Future activities.

activity_exception_decoration.name: activity_exception_decoration
activity_exception_decoration.help_text: Type of the exception activity on record.

activity_exception_icon.name: activity_exception_icon
activity_exception_icon.help_text: Icon to indicate an exception activity.

message_needaction.name: message_needaction
message_needaction.help_text: If checked, new messages require your attention.

message_has_error.name: message_has_error
message_has_error.help_text: If checked, some messages have a delivery error.

message_has_error_counter.name: message_has_error_counter
message_has_error_counter.help_text: Number of messages with delivery error

message_has_sms_error.name: message_has_sms_error
message_has_sms_error.help_text: If checked, some messages have a delivery error.

alias_id.name: alias_id
alias_id.help_text:
Send one separate email for each invoice.

Any file extension will be accepted.

Only PDF and XML files will be interpreted by Odoo

alias_name.name: alias_name
alias_name.help_text: The name of the email alias, e.g. 'jobs' if you want to catch emails for <jobs@example.odoo.com>

alias_defaults.name: alias_defaults
alias_defaults.help_text: A Python dictionary that will be evaluated to provide default values when creating new records for this alias.

code.name: code
code.help_text: Shorter name used for display. The journal entries of this journal will also be named using this prefix by default.

active.name: active
active.help_text: Set active to false to hide the Journal without removing it.

type.name: type
type.help_text:
Select 'Sale' for customer invoices journals.
        Select 'Purchase' for vendor bills journals.
        Select 'Cash', 'Bank' or 'Credit Card' for journals that are used in customer or vendor payments.
        Select 'General' for miscellaneous operations journals.

suspense_account_id.name: suspense_account_id
suspense_account_id.help_text: Bank statements transactions will be posted on the suspense account until the final reconciliation allowing finding the right account.

restrict_mode_hash_table.name: restrict_mode_hash_table
restrict_mode_hash_table.help_text: If ticked, when an entry is posted, we retroactively hash all moves in the sequence from the entry back to the last hashed entry. The hash can also be performed on demand by the Secure Entries wizard.

sequence.name: sequence
sequence.help_text: Used to order Journals in the dashboard view

invoice_reference_type.name: invoice_reference_type
invoice_reference_type.help_text: You can set here the default communication that will appear on customer invoices, once validated, to help the customer to refer to that particular invoice when making the payment.

invoice_reference_model.name: invoice_reference_model
invoice_reference_model.help_text: You can choose different models for each type of reference. The default one is the Odoo reference.

currency_id.name: currency_id
currency_id.help_text: The currency used to enter statement

country_code.name: country_code
country_code.help_text:
The ISO country code in two chars. 
You can use this field for quick search.

refund_sequence.name: refund_sequence
refund_sequence.help_text: Check this box if you don't want to share the same sequence for invoices and credit notes made from this journal

payment_sequence.name: payment_sequence
payment_sequence.help_text: Check this box if you don't want to share the same sequence on payments and bank transactions posted on this journal

sequence_override_regex.name: sequence_override_regex
sequence_override_regex.help_text:
Technical field used to enforce complex sequence composition that the system would normally misunderstand.
This is a regex that can include all the following capture groups: prefix1, year, prefix2, month, prefix3, seq, suffix.
The prefix* groups are the separators between the year, month and the actual increasing sequence number (seq).
e.g: ^(?P<prefix1>.*?)(?P<year>\d{4})(?P<prefix2>\D*?)(?P<month>\d{2})(?P<prefix3>\D+?)(?P<seq>\d+)(?P<suffix>\D*?)$

inbound_payment_method_line_ids.name: inbound_payment_method_line_ids
inbound_payment_method_line_ids.help_text:
Manual: Get paid by any method outside of Odoo.
Payment Providers: Each payment provider has its own Payment Method. Request a transaction on/to a card thanks to a payment token saved by the partner when buying or subscribing online.
Batch Deposit: Collect several customer checks at once generating and submitting a batch deposit to your bank. Module account_batch_payment is necessary.
SEPA Direct Debit: Get paid in the SEPA zone thanks to a mandate your partner will have granted to you. Module account_sepa is necessary.

outbound_payment_method_line_ids.name: outbound_payment_method_line_ids
outbound_payment_method_line_ids.help_text:
Manual: Pay by any method outside of Odoo.
Check: Pay bills by check and print it from Odoo.
SEPA Credit Transfer: Pay in the SEPA zone by submitting a SEPA Credit Transfer file to your bank. Module account_sepa is necessary.

profit_account_id.name: profit_account_id
profit_account_id.help_text: Used to register a profit when the ending balance of a cash register differs from what the system computes

loss_account_id.name: loss_account_id
loss_account_id.help_text: Used to register a loss when the ending balance of a cash register differs from what the system computes

bank_statements_source.name: bank_statements_source
selection: Manual (or import CAMT, CSV, JPEG, OFX, PDF, PNG, XLS, XLSX)
bank_statements_source.help_text: Defines how the bank statements will be registered

show_on_dashboard.name: show_on_dashboard
show_on_dashboard.help_text: Whether this journal should be displayed on the dashboard or not

check_manual_sequencing.name: check_manual_sequencing
check_manual_sequencing.help_text: Check this option if your pre-printed checks are not numbered.

check_next_number.name: check_next_number
check_next_number.help_text: Sequence number of the next printed check.

compatible_edi_ids.name: compatible_edi_ids
compatible_edi_ids.help_text: EDI format that support moves in this journal

expiring_synchronization_date.name: expiring_synchronization_date
expiring_synchronization_date.help_text: Date when the consent for this connection expires

renewal_contact_email.name: renewal_contact_email
renewal_contact_email.help_text: Comma separated list of email addresses to send consent renewal notifications 15, 3 and 1 days before expiry

aba_fic.name: aba_fic
aba_fic.help_text: 3 Character Financial Institution Code (e.g WBC for Westpac

aba_user_spec.name: aba_user_spec
aba_user_spec.help_text: Name of User supplying file - Your Financial Institution may specify the required User PreferredSpecification.

aba_user_number.name: aba_user_number
aba_user_number.help_text: User Identification Number, allocated by APCA.

aba_bsb.name: aba_bsb
aba_bsb.help_text: BSB code of the account associated to this journal

nacha_immediate_destination.name: nacha_immediate_destination
nacha_immediate_destination.help_text: This will be provided by your bank.

nacha_destination.name: nacha_destination
nacha_destination.help_text: This will be provided by your bank.

nacha_immediate_origin.name: nacha_immediate_origin
nacha_immediate_origin.help_text: This will be provided by your bank.

nacha_company_identification.name: nacha_company_identification
nacha_company_identification.help_text: This will be provided by your bank.

nacha_origination_dfi_identification.name: nacha_origination_dfi_identification
nacha_origination_dfi_identification.help_text: This will be provided by your bank.

nacha_entry_class_code.name: nacha_entry_class_code
nacha_entry_class_code.help_text:
Corporate Credit or Debit (CCD) - Used to pay from corporate (business) accounts.
Prearranged Payment and Deposit (PPD) - Used to pay from personal (consumer) accounts.

nacha_discretionary_data.name: nacha_discretionary_data
nacha_discretionary_data.help_text: Leave blank for most banks. Some banks (e.g. Chase) require users to enter their bank account number here in a specific format.

nacha_is_balanced.name: nacha_is_balanced
nacha_is_balanced.help_text: Use if your bank asks for a "balanced" NACHA file.

workflow_hints:
- - **Sub-records**: After creating the parent record, create sub-records via the sub-model fields: inbound_payment_method_line_ids, outbound_payment_method_line_ids. Always preview the parent first, then create sub-records in a second step.
- All required fields must be filled. Use preview action to check what's missing.
